metadata.name: Request to Cancel Service with Retention Offer

description: A customer wants to cancel due to high price. The agent must attempt a retention offer.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the customer and understand the reason for cancellation (price).

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the customer's identity and logs 'Price' as the cancellation reason.

nodes.task_description: Check the system for any available retention offers for this customer's profile.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a '20% off for 12 months' retention offer.

nodes.task_description: Present the retention offer to the customer. If accepted, apply it. If declined, proceed with cancellation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly presents the offer. Customer accepts. Agent applies the promotional discount.
